runs.brief_en: Tesla Cybercabs at Giga Texas now wear fleet decals, signaling an imminent Robotaxi launch. Elon Musk blasted Moody's for rating SpaceX above debt-free Tesla. Fortune says SpaceX's stock surge makes a Tesla merger more plausible. Sweden may block EU FSD approval over speeding.
runs.brief_zh: 德州Cybercab貼標誌即將上線；馬斯克批評信評；SpaceX併購特斯拉機率升；瑞典反對FSD超速。

items_flat.title_en: Cybercab fleet decals spotted at Giga Texas
items_flat.title_zh: 德州超級工廠 Cybercab 貼上車隊標誌
items_flat.summary_en: Drone footage shows Tesla applying "Cybercab" side decals to vehicles at Gigafactory Texas, mirroring the Robotaxi branding used on Model Y before Austin ride-hailing launched. The move, days after EPA certification, is widely read as the clearest signal yet that dedicated Cybercab fleet deployment is imminent.
items_flat.summary_zh: 空拍畫面顯示，特斯拉在德州超級工廠為 Cybercab 貼上側身車隊標誌，做法與一年前 Robotaxi Model Y 上線前類似。在 EPA 認證通過後數日出現此舉，被視為專用 Cybercab 車隊即將部署的最明確信號。

items_flat.title_en: Musk slams Tesla's Moody credit rating vs. SpaceX
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克批評特斯拉信評低於 SpaceX
items_flat.summary_en: After Moody assigned SpaceX a first-time Baa1 rating—two notches above Tesla's Baa3—Elon Musk posted on X that Tesla's rating "makes no sense," citing more than $40 billion in cash, zero debt, and consistent profitability.
items_flat.summary_zh: 穆迪首次給予 SpaceX Baa1 評級，比特斯拉的 Baa3 高兩級。馬斯克在 X 上回應稱特斯拉評級「毫無道理」，並強調公司現金逾 400 億美元、零負債且持續獲利。

items_flat.title_en: SpaceX IPO rally fuels Tesla merger speculation
items_flat.title_zh: SpaceX 上市飆漲推升併購特斯拉猜測
items_flat.summary_en: Fortune reports that SpaceX shares rising 37% to $185 in their first trading week would let the company acquire Tesla with less dilution than at the $135 IPO price, reviving talk of a megamerger after COO Gwynne Shotwell said on CNBC it "might make Elon Musk's life a little easier."
items_flat.summary_zh: 《財星》指出，SpaceX 上市首週股價從 135 美元飆至 185 美元，若以全股票併購特斯拉所需增發股份將少於 IPO 當時估算，再度炒熱併購話題；此前營運長 Shotwell 在 CNBC 表示此舉或能讓馬斯克「輕鬆一點」。

items_flat.title_en: SpaceX secures investment-grade ratings from Big Three
items_flat.title_zh: SpaceX 獲三大信評機構投資級評級
items_flat.summary_en: Moody's, Fitch, and S&P Global issued first-time investment-grade ratings for SpaceX days after its record IPO, citing Starlink cash flows and launch dominance. Moody's assigned Baa1—above Tesla's Baa3—while noting risks from Starship execution and heavy AI capex.
items_flat.summary_zh: 在創紀錄 IPO 後數日，穆迪、惠譽與標普首次給予 SpaceX 投資級評級，肯定 Starlink 現金流與發射主導地位。穆迪給予 Baa1，高於特斯拉 Baa3，同時警示星艦執行與 AI 巨額資本支出風險。

items_flat.title_en: Sweden urges EU to reject Tesla FSD over speeding
items_flat.title_zh: 瑞典敦促歐盟拒絕特斯拉 FSD 因超速問題
items_flat.summary_en: Sweden's Transport Administration told the EU's Technical Committee on Motor Vehicles it should vote against approving Tesla Full Self-Driving until the system cannot exceed speed limits. The committee meets June 30, as Tesla has won FSD approvals in several other European countries.
items_flat.summary_zh: 瑞典運輸管理局致函歐盟汽車技術委員會，建議在特斯拉關閉 FSD 超速能力前反對核准。委員會將於 6 月 30 日開會，而特斯拉已在多個歐洲國家取得 FSD 批准。

items_flat.title_en: Musk: Grok voice control for FSD arriving in ~3 months
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：Grok 語音控制 FSD 約三個月內推出
items_flat.summary_en: Responding on X to a Tesla owner who wanted to direct FSD like an Uber driver, Elon Musk said conversational Grok navigation—e.g., "turn right here" or drop-off instructions—should arrive in about three months, potentially including the long-teased Banish reverse-summon feature.
items_flat.summary_zh: 有車主在 X 希望像叫 Uber 一樣用語音指揮 FSD，馬斯克回覆稱約三個月內可透過 Grok 對話導航（如「這裡右轉」或指定下客點），並可能涵蓋多年來預告的 Banish 反向召喚停車功能。

items_flat.title_en: xAI launches Grok add-in for Microsoft Word
items_flat.title_zh: xAI 推出 Microsoft Word 版 Grok 外掛
items_flat.summary_en: xAI released a free Grok for Word add-in that turns notes into structured documents, rewrites text, searches the web and X, and connects to email and cloud drives. It joins existing Grok integrations for PowerPoint and Excel.
items_flat.summary_zh: xAI 發布免費 Grok for Word 外掛，可將筆記轉為結構化文件、改寫文字、搜尋網頁與 X，並串接郵件與雲端硬碟，與既有的 PowerPoint、Excel 外掛形成 Office 產品線。

items_flat.title_en: Grok models land on Databricks Agent Bricks
items_flat.title_zh: Grok 模型登陸 Databricks Agent Bricks
items_flat.summary_en: At the 2026 Data + AI Summit, xAI announced Grok is natively available on Databricks Agent Bricks, letting enterprises build governed AI agents on Lakehouse data alongside other frontier models.
items_flat.summary_zh: 在 2026 Data + AI 峰會上，xAI 宣布 Grok 原生接入 Databricks Agent Bricks，企業可在 Lakehouse 數據上與其他前沿模型一同構建受治理的 AI 代理。

items_flat.title_zh: 歐洲新聞網梳理馬斯克兆美元商業帝國
items_flat.summary_en: A June 20 Euronews profile traces how Musk's fortune grew from early Zip2 and PayPal exits to controlling SpaceX (now valued above $2 trillion post-IPO), Tesla (~$1.5 trillion), xAI, X, Neuralink, and The Boring Company under an increasingly integrated empire.
items_flat.summary_zh: 歐洲新聞網 6 月 20 日專文梳理馬斯克從 Zip2、PayPal 到掌控 SpaceX（IPO 後估值逾 2 兆美元）、特斯拉（約 1.5 兆）、xAI、X、Neuralink 與 Boring Company 的財富版圖，呈現日益整合的商業帝國。

brief_en: Tesla Cybercabs at Giga Texas now wear fleet decals, signaling an imminent Robotaxi launch. Elon Musk blasted Moody's for rating SpaceX above debt-free Tesla. Fortune says SpaceX's stock surge makes a Tesla merger more plausible. Sweden may block EU FSD approval over speeding.
brief_zh: 德州Cybercab貼標誌即將上線；馬斯克批評信評；SpaceX併購特斯拉機率升；瑞典反對FSD超速。
